title: GPT-6 Is Launching Into a World OpenAI No Longer Controls
summary: A video analysis claiming OpenAI's market dominance is eroding as Microsoft, Apple, and Google pursue alternative AI partnerships and models. The commentary covers competitive pressures including Microsoft's integration of its own technology in GitHub Copilot, Apple's choice of Gemini, and Claude competing on benchmarks.
writeup: The video argues that OpenAI's market dominance is eroding as major partners pursue alternatives ahead of GPT-6's launch. It points to Microsoft integrating its own technology into GitHub Copilot, Apple selecting Gemini, and Claude competing on benchmarks. The takeaway is that competitive pressure from Microsoft, Apple, and Google reframes OpenAI's position from leader to one player among several.
